title: Kantha
description: This project was built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, and PHP to create a responsive and user-friendly web application. MySQL was used for database management, while Git and GitHub handled version control. The application delivers reliable performance, secure data handling, and a seamless user experience.

title: Kreativ-Bauten
description: Jeff reached out after struggling to achieve what he envisioned with website builders.

For his craft business Kreativ-Bauten, we built a website that clearly presents his three specialties: exhibition construction, room acoustics and general craftsmanship. Rounded off by a custom animation that turns scrolling itself into part of the experience.
